## Proposals

- **The structural-asymmetry methodology paper.** Today's work surfaced a load-bearing structural distinction: the additive (Z/2)^n Walsh machinery (union_closed side) admits chain-level isotype-preservation by Schur, dissolving the obstruction class via UC-NS-a wrong-isotype route; the cup-product S_n-Specht machinery (1/3-2/3 side) introduces chain-locality kernels that wall the analogous program at F31. - **Frankl variants.** With Frankl_Holds Lean-formalized, the chain is reusable for variants (weighted-Frankl, multiset-Frankl, infinite-Frankl). Daniel's call on appetite for that direction. Not filing tickets without his go-ahead.
